events.title: 矿脉回声
events.description: 一簇蓝白矿晶在岩缝里低鸣。靠近它时，旧矿道的脚步声像潮水一样退回来。
events.descriptionEn: Blue-white crystals hum inside the rock. As you approach, old footsteps roll back like a tide.

choices.result: 矿晶被收入背包，矿灯也亮了一些。
choices.resultEn: The shard goes into your pack, and your lamp burns a little brighter.

choices.result: 你从回声里辨认出更稳的呼吸节奏，生命上限提高了。
choices.resultEn: You find a steadier breathing rhythm in the echo. Max HP increases.

events.title: 坍塌支道
events.description: 碎石挡住了侧路。缝隙后有一只旧工具箱，铁扣已经锈得发黑。
events.descriptionEn: Rubble blocks a side path. Behind a narrow gap sits an old toolbox with blackened iron clasps.

choices.text: 搬开碎石拿工具箱（失去 6 点生命）
choices.textEn: Move rubble for the toolbox (-6 HP)
choices.result: 碎石擦伤了手臂，但工具箱里躺着一柄保养完好的重镐。
choices.resultEn: The stones scrape your arm, but the toolbox holds a well-kept heavy pick.

choices.textEn: Take a detour and treat your wounds
choices.result: 你没有惊动支道深处的东西，并趁机处理了伤口。
choices.resultEn: You avoid whatever waits deeper in the side path and tend your wounds.

events.title: 旧矿工营地
events.description: 几顶破旧帆布帐篷还挂在岩钉上。火塘早已冷透，但工具架上仍有能用的东西。
events.descriptionEn: Torn canvas tents still hang from rock nails. The firepit is cold, but the tool rack has usable gear.

choices.result: 你找到一份爆破药包，火药味让矿灯晃了一下。
choices.resultEn: You find a blast charge. The powder smell makes your lamp flicker.

choices.result: 你把可用的绷带和灯油收好，状态稳定了不少。
choices.resultEn: You gather usable bandages and lamp oil, stabilizing your condition.

choices.result: 铜牌被挂在矿灯旁。它像是在提醒你别走得太急。
choices.resultEn: The tag hangs beside your lamp, quietly reminding you not to rush.
